历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for the science group were approximately 23970 → 7131 → 6678 → 6540 → 12667. The ranking in 2021 was abnormally high (23970), while from 2022 to 2024 it stabilized in the 6500–7100 range. In 2025, it significantly dropped to 12667, a decrease of about 6127 from 2024, mainly due to the classification of major groups (categorized enrollment) that year. The baseline ranking for 2025 is approximately 12667. The university's enrollment plan for the science group in Jiangxi: 383 in 2021, 381 in 2022, 381 in 2023, 386 in 2024, 357 in 2025, and 388 in 2026. Compared to 2025, 2026 sees an expansion of 31 students (+8.7%), a relatively large increase. According to the principle of supply-demand elasticity, this will push the minimum admission ranking higher (numerical increase), easing competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Huazhong University of Science and Technology is a 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class university. In the 2026 Soft Science Chinese University Ranking, it ranks 9th (Top 10), with a stable position at 8–9 in recent years, belonging to the top-tier universities nationwide. The reputation evaluation for the 2026 college entrance examination cycle is slightly positive, mainly involving the transparency of school management and cafeteria conditions (ranked first in national university cafeterias), which positively influences students' willingness to apply. The Douyin (TikTok) popularity is relatively high (ranked 22nd overall), with high exposure on short video platforms, reflecting increased attention for applications. No significant enrollment gaps have been observed. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, there are 17 disciplines rated A- or above: Mechanical Engineering A+, Optical Engineering A+, Electrical Engineering A+, Computer Science and Technology A, Control Science and Engineering A, Materials Science and Engineering A, Physics A, Power Engineering and Engineering Thermophysics A, Management Science and Engineering A, Clinical Medicine A-, etc. Engineering and medical fields are particularly strong, covering popular directions such as Computer Science, Electronic Information, Electrical Engineering, Mechanical Engineering, and Clinical Medicine.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The popularity of Computer Science has cooled from high recommendation to recommended but still relatively hot; Electronic Information/Communication and Electrical Engineering and Automation are both highly recommended; Clinical Medicine is recommended. HUST's strong engineering majors highly overlap with current socially popular majors, strongly attracting applicants. In 2026, the total number of candidates for the regular college entrance examination in Jiangxi is 474,900, a slight increase from 2025 (472,480). The estimated number of Physics Category candidates is about 268,319 (based on the recent proportion of 56.5%), an increase of about 1,894 (+0.7%) from 2025 (266,425), slightly intensifying competition. Provincial control line data: In 2025, the undergraduate batch line for Physics Category was 429 points, down from 448 points in 2024, possibly reflecting changes in exam difficulty or overall candidate performance. Huazhong University of Science and Technology is located in Wuhan, Hubei Province, adjacent to Jiangxi Province, in the central region, with convenient transportation and good regional preference. The university has a large enrollment scale in Jiangxi (388 in the science group), providing a stable admission channel for Jiangxi candidates.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Based on the 2025 baseline ranking of 12,667, the supply-demand elasticity main value from the 2026 expansion of 31 students (+8.7%) is approximately 13,327. Combined with the slight increase in Physics Category candidates in Jiangxi (+0.7%), the slightly positive university reputation, high Douyin popularity, and high social popularity of advantageous engineering majors, competition is expected to intensify slightly. The predicted minimum admission ranking for the 2026 science group is approximately 13,407, with a fluctuation range of 12,907–13,907.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for the liberal arts group were approximately 644 → 691 → 662 → 874 → 1063. From 2021 to 2023, it stabilized in the 640–690 range, jumped to 874 in 2024 (+212), and further shifted to 1063 in 2025 (+189), with a cumulative backward shift of about 401 positions over the last two years, showing a clear downward trend. The baseline ranking for 2025 is approximately 1063. The university's enrollment plan for the liberal arts group in Jiangxi Province: 38 in 2021, 42 in 2022, 44 in 2023, 44 in 2024, 58 in 2025, and 60 in 2026. Compared to 2025, 2026 sees an increase of 2 students (+3.4%), a relatively small expansion with limited impact on rankings.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Huazhong University of Science and Technology is a 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class university; ranked 9th in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings (Top 10), making it a top national university. Although liberal arts are not its traditional strength, the overall level of the university still strongly attracts liberal arts candidates. The reputation evaluation for the 2026 college entrance examination cycle is slightly positive, with the best cafeteria conditions in the country and a top-ranked journalism and communication discipline. It is relatively popular on Douyin (ranked 22nd overall). No record of enrollment gaps. Overall, the reputation is positive, promoting applications. Related advantageous liberal arts disciplines: Journalism and Communication A-, Business Administration A-, Public Administration (not individually rated but related). Journalism and Communication is an A- level discipline, offering professional appeal to liberal arts candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Law is divided between recommendation and discouragement, Journalism and Communication is clearly discouraged (heavily influenced by Zhang Xuefeng's remarks), Chinese Language and Literature is recommended, and Teacher Education/Education is divided. Overall, liberal arts majors are polarized, with traditional liberal arts majors experiencing a cooling in application heat. The estimated number of history category candidates in Jiangxi Province for 2026 is about 206,581 (based on the recent proportion of 43.5%), roughly unchanged from 2025 (206,055). Provincial control line: In 2025, the history category undergraduate batch was 486 points, up 23 points from 463 in 2024, indicating increased competition. Huazhong University of Science and Technology is located in Wuhan, Hubei, adjacent to Jiangxi, with convenient transportation, offering good regional affinity for Jiangxi candidates. The university's enrollment scale in the liberal arts group in Jiangxi is moderate (60 in 2026).

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Combining the 2025 baseline ranking of 1063, the small enrollment expansion of 2 students (+3.4%) in 2026 with a supply-demand elasticity main value of about 1085, and considering the recent continuous downward trend in the history category, the rise in the provincial control line reflecting increased competition, and the overall positive reputation of the university, the predicted ranking is estimated. The predicted minimum admission ranking for the 2026 liberal arts group is approximately 1115, with a fluctuation range of 988–1242.

历年位次与招生计划.text: The minimum admission rankings for Huazhong University of Science and Technology in Jiangxi Province over the past five years are: 2021: 23970 (nursing program lowered the overall ranking that year), 2022: 7131, 2023: 6678, 2024: 6540, 2025: 12667. The expansion puts downward pressure on admission rankings (ranking number increases, making admission easier), but the ranking has already dropped significantly in 2025, and the marginal impact of expansion is weakened due to the base effect.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Huazhong University of Science and Technology is a national key university directly under the Ministry of Education, a key construction university of the national '985 Project' and '211 Project', and selected as a 'Double First-Class' construction university. Its Tongji Medical College is one of the top medical schools in China, with top national affiliated hospitals such as Union Hospital and Tongji Hospital. The comprehensive strength of its medical disciplines ranks among the top in the country, continuously attracting high-scoring candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: In recent years, the popularity of medical majors has been rising steadily, with core majors such as clinical medicine and stomatology experiencing particularly fierce competition. Huazhong University of Science and Technology Tongji Medical College is located in Wuhan, a central city in the central region of China, with convenient transportation and obvious locational advantages. The enrollment scale for medical majors in Jiangxi Province is moderate, with a plan of 82 students in 2026, an increase compared to previous years, but overall, medical majors remain in short supply.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Based on the M3 supply-demand elasticity model calculation and historical trend correction, the predicted minimum admission ranking for Huazhong University of Science and Technology in Jiangxi Province for medical majors in 2026 is approximately 13289, with a fluctuation range of 12789 to 13789. After a significant drop in ranking in 2025, the expansion in 2026 will further push the ranking downward (making admission easier), but factors such as sustained medical popularity and the addition of new popular majors (e.g., pediatrics) provide some support for the ranking. It is expected that the ranking will slightly decrease compared to 2025, but the extent will be limited.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking falls within the predicted range, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2, use Tier 1 as a reach, and Tier 3 as a safety.
